purpose: Valibot is a modular, type-safe schema library for TypeScript/JavaScript used to validate unknown data (server input, forms, config files) at runtime with static type inference. Its modular API (many small independent functions) enables aggressive tree-shaking, yielding bundle sizes from <700 bytes.

public_api.name: object
public_api.summary: Creates an object schema from a record of field schemas.

public_api.name: string
public_api.summary: Schema that validates string values.

public_api.name: number
public_api.summary: Schema that validates number values.

public_api.name: boolean
public_api.summary: Schema for boolean values.

public_api.name: array
public_api.summary: Schema that validates arrays of the given item schema.

public_api.name: pipe
public_api.summary: Composes a schema with validation/transformation actions.

public_api.name: email
public_api.summary: Pipe action validating that a string is an email.

public_api.name: minLength
public_api.summary: Pipe action enforcing a minimum length on strings/arrays.

public_api.name: maxLength
public_api.summary: Pipe action enforcing a maximum length.

public_api.name: parse
public_api.summary: Parses input against a schema; throws on validation error.

public_api.name: safeParse
public_api.summary: Non-exception parsing; returns a result object with success/issues.

public_api.name: is
public_api.summary: Type guard function returning boolean for schema validity.

public_api.name: parser
public_api.summary: Creates a reusable parse function bound to a schema.

public_api.name: safeParser
public_api.summary: Creates a reusable safeParse function bound to a schema.

public_api.name: InferOutput
public_api.summary: Type helper inferring the output TypeScript type of a schema.

public_api.name: InferInput
public_api.summary: Type helper inferring the input TypeScript type of a schema.

public_api.name: optional
public_api.summary: Wraps a schema to allow undefined values.

public_api.name: nullable
public_api.summary: Wraps a schema to allow null values.

public_api.name: nullish
public_api.summary: Wraps a schema to allow null or undefined.

public_api.name: union
public_api.summary: Schema matching one of several given schemas.

public_api.name: intersect
public_api.summary: Schema requiring all given schemas to match.

public_api.name: literal
public_api.summary: Schema matching a specific literal value.

public_api.name: picklist
public_api.summary: Schema matching one of a list of literal options.

public_api.name: enum
public_api.summary: Schema matching TypeScript enum values.

public_api.name: record
public_api.summary: Schema for objects with arbitrary keys of a value schema.

public_api.name: tuple
public_api.summary: Schema for fixed-length tuples.

public_api.name: lazy
public_api.summary: Defers schema evaluation to support recursive schemas.

public_api.name: transform
public_api.summary: Pipe action that transforms the value.

public_api.name: check
public_api.summary: Pipe action performing a custom boolean validation.

public_api.name: ValiError
public_api.summary: Error class thrown by parse on validation failure.

public_api.name: flatten
public_api.summary: Flattens validation issues for easier consumption.

public_api.name: pick
public_api.summary: Creates a new object schema with only the chosen keys.

public_api.name: omit
public_api.summary: Creates a new object schema without the specified keys.

public_api.name: partial
public_api.summary: Makes all keys of an object schema optional.

public_api.name: required
public_api.summary: Makes all keys of an object schema required.

public_api.name: parseAsync
public_api.summary: Async version of parse for schemas containing async actions.

public_api.name: safeParseAsync
public_api.summary: Async non-throwing parser.

public_api.name: objectAsync
public_api.summary: Async variant of object schema.

public_api.name: pipeAsync
public_api.summary: Async variant of pipe supporting async actions.

usage_patterns.title: Define and parse a schema
usage_patterns.body: Create a schema with v.object and field schemas composed via v.pipe with validation actions (e.g. v.email, v.minLength). Use v.parse to validate and get typed data (throws on error), or v.safeParse for result-object style. Use v.is as a TypeScript type guard.

usage_patterns.title: Infer types from schemas
usage_patterns.body: Use `type T = v.InferOutput<typeof Schema>` (or v.InferInput) to derive TypeScript types from a schema, keeping runtime validation and compile-time types in sync.

usage_patterns.title: Modular imports for small bundles
usage_patterns.body: Import via `import * as v from 'valibot'` or named imports; the modular design lets bundlers tree-shake unused functions so only used schemas/actions ship to production.

usage_patterns.title: Async validation
usage_patterns.body: For schemas that need async checks, use the *Async counterparts (objectAsync, pipeAsync, parseAsync, safeParseAsync, checkAsync, transformAsync, etc.).

gotchas: parse throws (ValiError) on validation failure — use safeParse or is for non-throwing flows.
Pipe actions like email, minLength, etc. must be composed with v.pipe on a base schema (e.g. v.string()); they are not schemas themselves.
Async actions require the *Async schema and parse variants (parseAsync / safeParseAsync); mixing sync parse with async schemas will not work.
Modular API means each validator must be imported individually when using named imports; star import works but may defeat tree-shaking depending on bundler.

examples.title: Login schema with parse
